creator: dokas@dokas.name
text:
On 07/09/12 09:51, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov wrote:
> Paul Dokas wrote on 09.07.2012 18:11:
>> On 07/09/12 08:20, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov wrote:
>>> Paul, thank you for a quick response. The only problem - diff seems to
>>> be reverted (it actually downgrades security/bro from 2.0 to 1.5). You
>>> need to invoke diff like that:
>>>
>>> diff -ruNa bro.old/ bro.new/ > bro.diff
>>>
>>> to produce the correct patch. Please fix, thank you in advance!
>>>
>>> PS. Please keep bug-followup@ in cc:, I was wrong to recommend you to
>>> just response to this message. Sorry.
>>
>> No problem.  Attached is the correct diff.
>>
>> Paul
> 
> Hmm, now it only adds all the lines, not changes.


Looking at what I did to create that diff, I see that I had a typo in
the command to create the diff.  Attached is the proper diff.   Sorry
for the mistake.

Paul
